How easy was it to use?

L'application est un moyen d aide afin d identifier le chemin vers les differents campus de UConcordia. Personnellement, j utilise Google Map pour ce faire. Quand je compare avec Google Maps, je crois que l application est moins intuitive. La carte interieure reste un atout majeure si cela est acheve. cela va aporter un avantage majeure.
How easy was it to use?
The icons for things like direction could be bigger, also the icon for the shuttle bus looks more like a train
How easy was it to use?

It was alright to use. I think that you need to have a search bar more easily available so that people can press that rather than having to press a building first, that way people can more easily search for a building they are unfamiliar with.
I don't really like having too kmany apps on my phone, so probably not because I am familiar enough with where I need to go on campus
your userface is clean and I like the colour coding for different buildings

just what I said under "how easy was it to use"
